title: Xeno-free human iPSC-derived prostate organoid platform for multilineage differentiation and genetic manipulation
author: Buskin, Adriana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Raw bulk and single-cell RNA sequencing data associated with the manuscript “Xeno-free human iPSC-derived prostate organoid platform for multilineage differentiation and genetic manipulation” have been deposited in the European Nucleotide Archive (ENA) under accession number PRJEB101277. 
 This Zenodo record serves as a DOI-linked repository associated with the study and its publicly available sequencing datasets.
steps_raw:
Raw bulk and single-cell RNA sequencing data associated with the manuscript “Xeno-free human iPSC-derived prostate organoid platform for multilineage differentiation and genetic manipulation” have been deposited in the European Nucleotide Archive (ENA) under accession number PRJEB101277. 
 This Zenodo record serves as a DOI-linked repository associated with the study and its publicly available sequencing datasets.
